title: ilex gardneriana
intro: Ilex gardneriana, also known as the Taiwanese holly, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ilex gardneriana include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. The herbal preparations of Ilex gardneriana typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
